## Release purpose
This packet is a compact HC IX.2 public surface.
It is not the total archive.
It is sufficient for lawful citation, reviewer engagement, and first public refinement.

## Packaging order
1. abstract / précis
2. local architecture note
3. calls and mutual peering note
4. conjugate sign asymmetry appendix
5. reviewer-facing hierarchy / non-claims / provenance
6. companion architecture notes

## Forthcoming only
The following belong to HC X and should only be mentioned briefly:
- context frame conjugation
- missing Riemann symmetries
- the conjugate of the $\tfrac{1}{2}$ vortex
- prime-facing extensions
